accountCreatedMessage: Ikonti yawe yuguruwe neza. Ubu urashobora kwinjira.

passwordUppercase: Ijambo kabanga ritegerezwakuba kuba karimwo n’iburiburi urudome rukuru
passwordNumber: Ijambo kabanga ritegerezwa kuba karimwo n’iburiburi igiharuro

verifyEmail.verifyingDesc: Turiko turagenzura ikibanza ca email yawe. Ntibitwara umwanya munini.
verifyEmail.successDesc2: yaremejwe. Ubu ushobora kwinjira kuri konti yawe.
verifyEmail.errorDesc: Iyo nzira yo kwemeza siyo canke yarataye igihe.
verifyEmail.resendHint: Ushobora gusaba yuko turungika iyindi nzira yo kwemeza.
verifyEmail.resendEmail: Subira urungike ubutumwa bwawe kuri email
verifyEmail.invalidDesc: Iyo nzira yo kwemeza siyo canke ntikwije ibisabwa.

identifierPlaceholder: koresha email canke nomero ya telefone
youMustAcceptTermsAndConditions: Utegerezwa kwemera amategeko n'uburyo vy'ikoreshwa  ry’amakuru
aboutCopaTitle: Akaryo keza ko guteza imbere abanyamingambi b’Abarundi
aboutCopaDesc1: Ihiganwa ry’imigambi y’iterambere (COPA) ni kimwe mu bikorwa vy’umugambi wiyemeje kugwiza akazi n’ihinduka mu bijanje n’ubutunzi (PRETE), ufashwe mu mugongo n’ibanki y’isi yose. Intumbero yacu ni: kumenya neza, kwigisha no gushigikira amashirahamwe mato mato n'ama koperative agaragaza ko ari imbere mu migambi gusumvya ayandi mu Burundi.
aboutCopaDesc2: Ihiganwa COPA ryagenewe abantu bose bafise ibikorwa vyo kwiteza imbere, na cane cane abakenyezi hamwe n’impunzi zipfuza gutanguza igikorwa co kwiyungunganya mu Burundi.
howItWorksTitle: Intambuko 5 zishikana amashirahamwe mato mato n'ama koperative mu nzira yo gukora neza
step1Desc: Ugurura ikonti yawe nshasha hanyuma wuzuze umwidondoro wawe nk’umunyamigambi mu minota mikeya.
step2Desc: Kurikirana amakuru yacu atangwa ku buntu kugira wironkere ubumenyi buhagije kugira ushobore kwitunganiriza umugambi w'iterambere udasanzwe.
step3Desc: Andika wongere urungike umugambi wawe w’iterambere imbere y’uko ikiringo categekanijwe kirangira. Abahinga bacu bazoca bawusuzuma biciye mu muco ntangere.
step4Title: Ronka inyunganizi yawe mu ma mashini, ibikoresho vya kijambere hamwe n'amafaranga
step4Desc: Mu gihe watowe mu bandi, uraronka imfashanyo y’amafaranga ahuye n’umugambi washikirije hamwe n’ugukurikiranwa ku giti cawe kugira umugambi wawe uje mu ngiro.
step5Desc: Umaze kuronswa inyunganizi yawe, uzokurikira inyigisho zo gutunganya ishirahamwe ryawe hamwe n’izindi nyigisho zidasanzwe zijanye n’ivyo mukeneye. Vyongeye, harategekanijwe imyimenyerezo nkenerwa n’impanuro z’abahinga kugirango mushikire intumbero y’imigambi y’ishirahamwe ryanyu.
impactDesc: Uko COPA yafashije mw’irangurwa ry’imigambi mu biharuro
testimonial1Label: Uwatsindiye inyunganizi ya COPA mu mwaka wa 2026
testimonial1Text: Kubw’umugambi COPA, narashoboye guhindura ishirahamwe ryanje rito mw’ishirahamwe riteye imbere. Inyigisho zatumye ngira inguvu zo kubandanya hanyuma inyunganizi y’ibikoresho, ama mashini n'amafaranga vyatumye ntera imbere. Kugez’ubu, nkoresha abakozi bagera kuri 5!
testimonial2Label: Uwatsindiye inyunganizi ya COPA mu mwaka wa 2026
testimonial2Text: Mfashijwe na COPA, umugambi wanje wavuye mu vyiyumviro ucika igicuruzwa giteguwe neza. Inyigisho nahawe zatumye nshobora gutunganya neza umugambi wanje,inyunganizi na yo yamfashije kugura ibikoresho vya nkenerwa. Ubu ndaronka abakiriya benshi kandi narahaye akazi abantu 4!
testimonial3Label: Uwatsindiye inyunganizi ya COPA mu mwaka wa 2026
testimonial3Text: Umugambi COPA wagize uruhara runini mw’iterambere ryanje. Inyunganizi yatumye nshobora gutunganya ishirahamwe ryanje mu kwongereza ubushobozi bwa ryo. Ubu, umutahe wariyongereye kandi narongereje abakozi 4.
blogTitle1: Inama zanyu zirarambira? Gerageza izi mpanuro 10
blogDesc1: Ico ukora cose mu bijanye n’indinganizo canke inyigisho, intumbero itegerezwa gushimikira ku gushigikira imigambi.
blogTitle2: Uriko urimura ibikorwa vyawe mu kindi gihugu?
blogDesc2: Uwurongoye ishirahamwe ategerezwa kwiyumvira ibirenze guhitamwo aho yimurira ibikorwa vyiwe!
blogTitle3: Hari uwukwiye guterwa isoni n’akazi kiwe?
blogDesc3: Bishobora kuba ari karemano canke ibiva ahandi ariko ingaruka zishobora kuba izitangaje...
blogTitle4: Ni gute twohangana n’ukutabona ibintu neza ku bafise uburambe?
blogDesc4: Ico ukora cose mu bijanye n’indinganizo canke inyigisho, intumbero itegerezwa gushimikira ku gushigikira imigambi.
copyright: Uburenganzira bwa nyene igikorwa: © 2026 PRETE – Ntawemerewe kwiyitirira iki gikorwa | Gifashwe mu mugongo n’ibanki y’isi yose
bannerTitle: COPA - Ihiganwa ry’imigambi yo kwiteza imbere
bannerDescription: Hindura umugambi wawe ube ishirahamwe riteye imbere. COPA Nyunganira ifasha amashirahamwe akiri matomato (MPME) hamwe n’ama koperative yo mu Burundi biciye mu nyigisho, gukurikiranwa hamwe n’inyunganizi biciye mu mahiganwa kugira imigambi yanyu ishirwe mu ngiro.
bannerCall: Guhamagarira amashirahamwe mato mato n'ama Koperative kugaragaza icese ko bipfuza kuba mu mugwi wa mbere wa COPA

project.title: Umugambi w'Akazi n'Iterambere ry'Ubutunzi
project.description: PRETE ni umugambi wa Reta y’Uburundi, ufashwe mu mugongo n’Ibanki y’isi yose, ufise intumbero yo gufasha abantu kwiteza imbere mu kugwiza ubutunzi ata n’umwe asigaye inyuma no kugwiza akazi mu gihugu. Hakoreshejwe amafaranga agera ku miriyoni ijana z’amadorari y’Abanyamerika (100,000,000$USD),uwo mugambi uzomara ikiringo c’imyaka 5 (2024-2028).

list: Gukarihiriza ubwenge amashirahamwe matomato (MPME) n'ama koperative
Guteza imbere igisata c’abikorera utwabo mu Burundi
Gushigikira abafise imigambi kugira ngo bayirangure.
Gukomeza iterambere ridakumira ku bakenyezi hamwe n’impunzi
Gushigikira ishirwa ry’imitahe mu bisata vyizewe bihuye n’ibihe tugezemwo

list.title: Kworohereza amashirahamwe gushikira amasoko no gukomeza uruhererekane nyungurabutunzi
Kworohereza amashirahamwe kuronswa infashanyo irama kandi atawukumiriwe
Kworohereza mu buryo burama igisata c'abikorera utwabo n'abanyamitahe
igice ca gatanu: igisata co gutabara mu gihe c'ivyago

buttons.learnMoreAboutPrete: Menya vyinshi ku bijanye na PRETE

cta.title: Uriteguriye kwinjira mu mugambi wa COPA?
cta.description: Iyandikishe ubu kugira uhabwe inyunganizi ikwiye yo guteza imbere ishirahamwe ryawe.

intro.title: COPA
intro.subtitle: Ihiganwa ry’Imigambi y’iterambere
intro.description1: COPA (Ihiganwa ry’Imigambi y’iterambere) ni uburyo nyamukuru bw’igice 1.2 ca PRETE. Ni umugambi wuzuye wo gushigikira abanyamigambi b’Abarundi uhuza inyigisho, ubuhanuzi n’inyunganizi.
intro.description2: COPA iha abafise imigambi irashe akaryo kadasanzwe ko kubakarihiriza ubwenge no kubaha inyunganizi itarihwa kugira bashire mu ngiro imigambi ya bo.

copaInfo.label: Intumbero nyamukuru
copaInfo.value1: Intumbero nyamukuru ni uguteza imbere amashirahamwe mato mato y’abikorera utwabo

copaInfo.label: Intumbero nyamukuru
value1: Inyigisho z’abahinga ku mashirahamwe y’abikorera utwabo;
Gutora biciye mw’ihiganwa amashirahamwe azoronswa inyunganizi;
Imfashanyo y’ubuhinga ku mashirahamwe azoronswa inyunganizi;
Ihinganwa ry' imigambi yo kwiteza imbere;
Ikurirana ry’ishirwa mu ngiro y’umugambi w’iterambere n’ibijanye no guhangana n’ihindaguirika ry’ibihe.

copaInfo.label: Ibice vy’ibikorwa vyerekeye  umugambi wa COPA
copaInfo.value1: Ihanahana ry’ibidandazwa vyahinguwe mu vyavuye mu burimyi, Amahinguriro y’ibiva mu burimyi n’ubworozi (amata, inkoko, amafi, ivyamwa n’ibindi bisata birimwo akarusho kisununuye),           ii) ubutare, iii) n’ibindi bikorwa bijanye n’uburimyi (harimwo igisata c’ingenzi n’ubuhinga bwa none).

copaInfo.label: Igihe co gushira mu ngiro umugambi wa COPA
copaInfo.value1: Kuva muri Nzero 2026 gushika muri Kigarama 2028.

copaInfo.label: Igitigiri c’imigwi
copaInfo.value1: Imigwi 6 ifise ikiringo kiri hagati y’amezi 12 na 18 ku mugwi umwe umwe.

copaInfo.label: Amashirahamwe y’abikorera utwabo azoronswa intererano
copaInfo.value1: Amashirahamwe matomato n’amakoperative (harimwo n’ayatemewe n’amategeko), ubuhinga bwo guteza imbere urwego rw’abikorera utwabo, ni ukuvuga:
value2: Gutora vy’ibanze: Amashirahamwe mato mato n’amakoperative 1200 (harimwo 50% vy’amashirahamwe mato mato arongowe n’abagore na 20% arongowe n’impunzi)
Gutora biciye mw’ihiganwa: Amashirahamwe mato mato n’amakoperative 600 (harimwo 50% vy’amashirahamwe mato mato arongowe n’abagore na 6,6% arongowe n’impunzi)

timeline.sectionSubtitle: Uburyo bw’ishirwa mu ngiro rya COPA
timeline.description: Ishirwa mu ngiro rya COPA ritegekanijwe mu bice bibiri nyamukuru: gutorwa hisunzwe imigambi hamwe no gutorwa biciye mw’ihiganwa ry’imigambi.

phases.phase: Ihamagarwa ry’amashirahamwe mato mato yipfuza guhiganisha imigambi
phases.description: Amashirahamwe mato mato n’amakoperative yujuje ibisabwa yipfuza kwiyandikisha mw’ihiganwa ry’imigambi aratumiwe kwiyandikisha ku rubuga ngurukana bumenyi rwa COPA nyunganira : www.copa-prete.bi.

phases.phase: Umwihwezo w'ibisabwa vyatanzwe n’amashirahamwe yiyandikishije hamwe n'itangazwa ry’ivyavuyemwo
phases.description:
Kuri iyo ntambwe, ibisabwa vyatanzwe birasuzumwa hisunzwe ingingo ngenderwako zo kwakigwa no kwemererwa.
Ivyavuye mu gutorwa hisunzwe imigambi biramenyeshwa abiyandikishije bose (abatowe n’abatatowe). Abatowe kuri iyo ntambwe baremererwa kubandanya mu mugambi wo gushigikirwa no kwigishwa gutegura neza imigambi y’iterambere, kandi abatatowe barashobora gusubira kwiyandikisha mu migwi ikurikira mu gihe bubahirije ingingo ngenderwako zo kwakirwa no kwemererwa.

phases.phase: Iyinjizwa mu mugambi wo gushigikirwa mu nteguro y’imigambi y’iterambere
phases.description: Abatowe barashigikirwa mu gutegura imigambi yabo y’iterambere hamwe n’ivyigwa vyerekeye gukoresha ubuhinga bwa none no kubungabunga ibidukikije n’imibano.

Igihe co gutanga umugambi w’iterambere kizotangura ubwo nyene inyuma y’igice co gushigikira abatowe mw’itorwa hisunzwe imigambi. Imigambi y’iterambere yashikirijwe izosuzumwa n’umugwi b’abahinga bigenga.
Ibikorwa vy’isuzuma y’imigambi y’iterambere biheze, hazotorwa imigambi myiza gusumba iyindi, abazotsinda n’abatazotsinda, bazomenyeshwa ivyavuyemwo.

Iyo nyunganizi, iri hagati y’amadolari y’abanyamerika 10.000 na 20.000, izotangwa mu buryo bw’ibikoresho vy’ubuhinga (ama mashini, ibikoresho, icemezo c’ubuziranenge n’ibindi) n’uburyo bwo gukoresha (nk’imishahara, ibikoresho vyo gutangura, ibindi bikoresho vy’abakozi, amahera yo gupanga, umuyagankuba, n’ibijanye no gusanura ibikoresho, hamwe n’ibindi).
Imigambi y’abatsinze izosuzumwa ku bijanye no kubungabunga ibidukikije n’imibano kugira hubahirizwe ibisabwa n’amategeko imbere y’uko bashikirizwa inyunganizi za bo.

phases.phase: Iyinjizwa mu mugambi wo gushigikirwa inyuma yo kuronswa inyunganizi
phases.description: Inyuma yo kuronswa inyunganizi, abayitsindiye bazoronswa inyingisho mu bijanye n’uburongozi no gutunganya amashirahamwe yabo. Vyongeye, bazoronka inyigisho zidasanzwe hamwe no gukurikiranwa n’abahinga mu vyo bazokenera vyose kugira amashirahamwe yabo ashikire ihangiro biyemeje.

list.title: Inyunganiz
list.desc: Gutanga inyunganizi ku batsinze kugira bashire mu ngiro imigambi yabo.

list.label: Abanyamigambi b’abakenyezi

applicationSubmitted.title: Kwemeza ivyasabwe
applicationSubmitted.notification: Muzoronswa ubutumwa kuri imeyiri no kuri SMS igihe ivyavuye mu gice ca mbere vyasohotse.
applicationSubmitted.confirmation: Turabamenyesha ko twakiriye neza dosiye yanyu yo gusaba kwandikwa kandi turabashimira ko mwitayeho umugambi COPA Nyunganira.
applicationSubmitted.review: Umugwi ujejwe guhitamwo uzosuzuma dosiye yanyu hanyuma tuzobamenyesha ivyavuye mw’isuzumwa.
applicationSubmitted.contact: Nimba mufise ikibazo, twandikire kuri contact@copa-prete.bi canke muterefone kuri +257 62 766 766.

intro.title: Raba ko ufise uburenganzira bwo kwitaba ihiganwa COPA
intro.description: COPA ifunguriwe Amashirahamwe matomato n’amakoperative akwijwe ibisabwa bikurikira. Raba ko ubikwije mbere yo kwiyandikisha.

recevabilityItems: Ikete ry’ugusaba ryatanzwe mu gihe gitegekanijwe?
Uwusaba yaratanze icemeza ko aba mu Burundi?
Uwusaba yarujuje neza ifishi yo kuri interineti?
Uwusaba yaratanze ibisabwa vyose mu kwiyandikisha
Uwusaba ntacoba kimubuza kwemererwa bivanye n’inyungu zindi afise afise mu mugambi COPA?

eligibilityItems.label: Amategeko ngenderwako y'ashirahamwe mato mato canke amakoperative
eligibilityItems.desc: Yanditswe mu budandaji (RC) canke muri ANACOOP, afise NIF canke ifise icemezo c’ukumenyekana muri komine canke akarere cemeza ko iryo shirahamwe rimaze umwaka umwe rikora ku mashirahamwe adasanzwe yemewe mu mategeko.

eligibilityItems.label: Imico myiza y'amashirahamwe mato mato canke amakoperative n’canke abayobozi bayo
eligibilityItems.desc: Ishirahamwe ntirishobora kuba ridakurikiza amategeko arigenga aho rikorera.

eligibilityItems.label: Ibisata vyegwa n'umugambi wa COPA
eligibilityItems.desc: Uburimyi nzanamafaranga, Amahinguriro yo mu vy’uburimyi (Amata, Inkoko, Amafi, Ivyamwa  n’ibindi bisata bifise ubushobozi bunini), ii) ubutare na iii) ibikorwa vy’ Uburimyi nzanamafaranga harimwo ivy'ingenzi n’ubuhinga bwa none).

eligibilityItems.label: Aho amashirahamwe matomato canke amakoperative ari
Ikibanza c’uwufise umugambi
eligibilityItems.desc: Nyene umugambi ategerezwa kuba ari we awuhagarariye imbere y’amategeko agenga amashirahamwe matomato n’amakoperative.

eligibilityItems.label: Uko inyunganizi ingana
eligibilityItems.desc: Inyunganizi izotangwa iri hagati y’amadorari y'amanyamerika 10 000 na 20 000.

eligibilityItems.label: Kwitwararika ibibazo bijanye n’ibidukikije n’ivy’umubano
eligibilityItems.desc: Abayobozi b'amashirahamwe mato mato canke amakoperative babwirizwa kuba baritunganije mu bijanye n’ibisabwa n’Itegeko n°100/22 ryo ku wa 7 Gitugutu 2010 hamwe n’Ibijanye n’ibidukikije n’ivy’ umubano(CGES)mu mugambi wa PRETE. Isuzuma rishingiye ku bidukikije n’umubano bizokwerekana neza uko amashirahamwe mato mato canke amakoperative ameze.

eligibilityItems.label: Kutabangikanya inyungu z'akazi
eligibilityItems.desc: Uwusaba ntategerezwa kuba ata zindi nyungu abangikanije.

options.title: Umugwi wa mbere — Ishirahamwe ryemewe n'amategeko
items: Ifishi yo gusaba ku rubuga yujujwe neza.
Kopi ya karangamuntu canke ikarita y’impunzi y’umuyobozi yemewe n’inzego z’Uburundi kandi itarata igihe.
Urupapuro rw’amategeko rugaragaza ko umuyobozi w’isosiyete ata mananiza yagirizwa mu mezi atatu ashize.
Ibaruwa yo gushiraho umuyobozi niba atandukanye n’uwanditswe mu Rwandiko rw’ubucuruzi.
Kopi y’Icyangombwa c’Ubucuruzi canke icyemezo cyo kwiyandikisha ca kooperatifi canke NIF y'ishirahamwe ryikorera ivyaryo.
Icegeranyo c’ubutunzi c’amezi 6 aheze ca MPME. Icegeranyo ca mobile money n’igitabo c’igurishwa birakirwa.

options.title: Umugwi wa kabiri — Ishirahamwe ritaremerwa n'amategeko
items: Ifishi yo gusaba ku rubuga yujujwe neza.
Icemezo cemeza ko ishirahamwe imaze n’imiburiburi umwaka umwe ku munsi wo gusaba.
Kopi ya karangamuntu y’umuyobozi canke ikarita y’impunzi yemejwe n’inzego z’Uburundi kandi itarata igihe.
Urupapuro rw’amategeko rugaragaza ko umuyobozi w’ishirahamwe ata mananiza yagirizwa mu mezi atatu aheze.
Icegeranyo c’ubutunzi c’amezi 6 aheze z’umuyobozi w’ishirahamwe. Icegeranyo ca mobile money n’igitabo c’igurishwa birakirwa.

cta.title: Ukeneye insiguro ku bisabwa?
cta.description: Umugwi wacu uragufasha kumenya neza ibisabwa.

success.title: Ivyo washikirije vyakiriwe
success.message: Urakoze kuduha aya makuru. Twakira nkampa ibirego canke amakuru yawe y’ibitagenze neza kandi mw’ibanga.
notifications: Muzoronswa inyishu mu kiringo c’iminsi 15 y’akazi.
Ivyo washikirije bikurikiranwa mw’ibanga nta ngere.
Bika inomero ndangakirego kugira ushobore gukurikirana aho kigeze.
success.vbgNotification: 🆘 Ibibazo vy’ihohoterwa rifatiye ku gitsina VBG/EAS-HS bihabwa ikibanza ca mbere.

intro.title: Menyesha ikibazo canke ikitagenze neza
intro.description: COPA yiyemeje kwakira no gutorera inyishu I bibazovyanyu mw’ibanga no mu buryo bubereye. Nimba wabonye ikibazo, ugucudika canke imyifato itabereye,bitumenyeshe kare.
types: Amabi, ugukubagurwa n’ihohoterwa bifatiye ku gitsina (VBG/EAS-HS)

eligibilitySectionSubtitle: Wishuye ico kibazo uzoba uhaye uburenganzira abatunganije uwo mugambi kugira amatohoza bibaye ngombwa
isPublicServantLabel: Woba uri umukozi wa Leta canke woba ukorera umugambi wa Leta ufashijwe n’amashirahamwe mpuzamakungu asanzwe afasha Uburundi?
isRelativeOfPublicServantLabel: Woba wubakanye, umuvyeyi canke umwana w’uwo mukozi wa Leta?

forgotPasswordPage.title: Wibagiye ijambo kabanga

forgotPasswordPage.success: Ubutumwa bwo gusubiramwo ijambo kabanga bwemejwe.

resetPassword.verifyingDesc: Turiko turasuzuma umurongo wawe wo guhindura ijambo ry'ibanga...
resetPassword.successDesc: Ijambo ryawe kabanga ryahinduwe kandi ryemewe
resetPassword.errorDesc: Habaye ingorane mugihe co guhindura ijambo kabanga ryawe.
resetPassword.resendHint: Ngira akaryango kwugawe. Murashobora gusaba akandi:
resetPassword.invalidDesc: Uyu murongo wo guhindura ijambo kabanga ntukora canke wataye igihe.
resetPassword.footerNote: Ku bw'umutekano, uyu murongo umara isaha imwe gusa.
